main.description: A Link-in-Bio profile (one per user, key is literal:self).

displayName.description: The profile display name shown on the public page.

description.description: Short bio/description shown under the display name.

theme.description: Personalized color + mode for this profile.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the profile was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last profile update.

theme.description: Visual personalization for the Link-in-Bio page.

accent.description: Accent color as a CSS hex string, e.g. #f291a5 or #f291a5cc.
